summary: Rolling Calibration System Testing - All 31 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. New rolling calibration features working correctly: GET/POST rolling calibration endpoints work, health endpoint includes calibration_status with sources/source_summary/calibration_source fields, config endpoint has all rolling calibration fields, config update persistence works, Weather page Calibration tab shows Rolling Live Calibration section, Settings page shows rolling calibration toggle and fields. No regressions on existing pages.

backend_api_tests: Rolling status has all required fields: enabled, total_stations_calibrated, total_resolved_records, needs_recalculation, min_samples_required, last_run, last_status, etc.
Rolling status has correct data types
Rolling status correctly reports insufficient_data when not enough resolved records
Rolling run returns results with status, stations_processed, stations_calibrated, stations_insufficient, results
Rolling run correctly reports insufficient data for all stations (only 1 resolved record, min_samples=15)
calibration_status has sources field (dict mapping station_id to source name)
calibration_status has source_summary field (dict with source counts)
calibration_status has calibration_source field (historical_bootstrap with engine started)
POST /api/config/update with rolling_calibration_enabled=false updates and persists
POST /api/config/update with rolling_min_samples=25 updates and persists
Engine start correctly populates calibration_sources in health endpoint
frontend_ui_tests: Weather page loads with data-testid='weather-page'
All 7 tabs found: Signals, Alerts, Rejected, Executions, Forecasts, Calibration, Health
Calibration tab visible with data-testid='tab-calibration'

Rolling calibration section shows Enabled: YES stat
Rolling calibration section shows Resolved Records: 1 stat
Rolling calibration section shows Stations Calibrated: 0 stat
Rolling calibration section shows Min Samples: 15 stat
Rolling calibration section shows Needs Recalc: No stat
Empty state message 'No rolling calibrations computed yet' shown
Health tab shows CalibrationStatusCard with data-testid='section-weather-calibration'
CalibrationStatusCard shows Active Source badge (HISTORICAL)
CalibrationStatusCard shows 'Calibrated Stations: 8 / 8'
CalibrationStatusCard shows 'Source Breakdown: HISTORICAL 8 stations'
Health tab Strategy Config shows 'Rolling Cal Enabled' field
Health tab Strategy Config shows 'Rolling Min Samples' field
Health tab Strategy Config shows 'Rolling Recalc Interval' field
Health tab Strategy Config shows 'Rolling Recalc After' field
Settings page loads with data-testid='settings-page'
Settings page Strategy Configuration shows Weather Trader section
'Rolling Calibration' toggle found in Settings
'Rolling Min Samples' field found in Settings
'Rolling Recalc Interval' field found in Settings
'Rolling Recalc After' field found in Settings
rolling_calibration_enabled toggle (data-testid='toggle-weather_trader-rolling_calibration_enabled') found showing 'ON'
Toggle click changes state ON -> OFF -> ON successfully
Overview page loads (no regression)
Arbitrage page loads (no regression)
Sniper page loads (no regression)
Weather page loads (no regression)
Positions page loads (no regression)
Analytics page loads (no regression)
Settings page loads (no regression)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Rolling calibration system works but reports insufficient_data (only 1 resolved forecast record exists, min_samples=15 required per station).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rolling Calibration System fully implemented and tested. KEY FEATURES: (1) GET /api/strategies/weather/calibration/rolling/status returns correct shape with enabled, total_stations_calibrated, total_resolved_records, needs_recalculation, min_samples_required, last_run, last_status, recalc_interval_hours, recalc_after_n_records, stations (2) POST /api/strategies/weather/calibration/rolling/run executes rolling calibration and returns results with stations_processed, stations_calibrated, stations_insufficient - currently returns insufficient_data for all stations (only 1 resolved record, need 15 per station) (3) POST /api/strategies/weather/calibration/rolling/reload returns reload status (4) GET /api/strategies/weather/health includes calibration_status with sources, source_summary, calibration_source fields - shows 'historical_bootstrap' when engine is started (8 stations using historical calibrations) (5) GET /api/strategies/weather/config includes rolling_calibration_enabled, rolling_min_samples, rolling_recalc_interval_hours, rolling_recalc_after_n_records (6) POST /api/config/update with strategies.weather_trader payload persists changes - tested toggling rolling_calibration_enabled and updating rolling_min_samples (7) Weather page Calibration tab shows 'Rolling Live Calibration' section with data-testid='section-rolling-calibration' showing Enabled, Resolved Records, Stations Calibrated, Min Samples, Needs Recalc stats, plus Run Now and Reload buttons (8) Weather Health tab shows CalibrationStatusCard with data-testid='section-weather-calibration' containing Active Source badge showing HISTORICAL, Calibrated Stations count, Source Breakdown (9) Settings page Weather Trader section shows rolling_calibration_enabled toggle (ON/OFF button) and rolling numeric fields (10) Tri-level priority: rolling > historical > default - currently using historical_bootstrap since no rolling calibrations have sufficient data (11) Engine is STOPPED by default - need to start engine for calibration sources to populate (12) 8 stations have historical bootstrap calibrations: KLGA, KORD, KLAX, KATL, KDFW, KMIA, KDEN, KSFO (13) No mocked APIs
